device_name: EFAI ChestSuite XR Pneumothorax Assessment System
intended_use: EFAI PNXXR is a software workflow tool designed to aid the clinical assessment of adult (22 years of age or older) Posteroanterior (PA) view Chest X-Ray cases with features suggestive of pneumothorax
intended_use_full: EFAI PNXXR is a software workflow tool designed to aid the clinical assessment of adult (22 years of age or older) Posteroanterior (PA) view Chest X-Ray cases with features suggestive of pneumothorax in the medical care environment. EFAI PNXXR analyzes cases using an artificial intelligence algorithm to identify suspected findings. It makes case-level output available to a PACS/workstation for worklist prioritization or triage. EFAI PNXXR is not intended to direct attention to specific portions or anomalies of an image. Its results are not intended to be used on a stand-alone basis for clinical decision-making nor is it intended to rule out pneumothorax or otherwise preclude clinical assessment of X-Ray cases.
ground_truth: Majority agreement among three independent US board-certified radiologists
other_metrics: Average performance time: 23.3 seconds (95% CI [23.2, 23.4]); Subgroup analysis performed across gender, age, manufacturer, data source, and pneumothorax size/location
